description: Stores daily learning insights with auto-detected topics, source classification, and cross-references to related past learnings.

Title.description: Auto-generated 5-8 word summary of the learning insight

Insight.description: Full learning text as provided by the user (15-2000 characters)

Topics.description: Auto-detected topic categories (1-3 per learning). 10 predefined + custom topics allowed.

Source Type.description: How the learning was acquired. Auto-detected from context or specified via --source flag.

Context.description: Optional additional context provided via --context flag

Related IDs.description: Comma-separated page IDs of 2-3 most related past learnings (stored as rich_text for lazy-creation compatibility)

Related Titles.description: Comma-separated titles of related past learnings for quick scanning

Week.description: ISO week identifier as YYYY-WNN text (e.g., '2026-W10') for weekly aggregation queries

Logged At.description: Timestamp when the learning was captured

notes: Lazy creation by database name on first /learn:log. Idempotent upsert by Title + same calendar day to allow multiple distinct learnings per day but prevent accidental duplicates. Related IDs/Titles stored as rich_text (not Notion relation type) for lazy-creation compatibility. Week field enables ISO week queries for /learn:weekly synthesis.
